title: Ternary operator does not expect parameterized class type

features.name: ternary operator with parameterized class type result
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator where one branch returns a value of a parameterized class type and the other branch returns null

features.name: parameterized class with default type parameter
features.description: Code should include a class declared with a type parameter that has a default value different from the actual instantiation

features.name: static class method returning parameterized type
features.description: Code should include a static class method that returns an instance of a parameterized class with a type argument

features.name: virtual function returning parameterized type
features.description: Code should include a virtual function whose return type is a type parameter of the enclosing class
